This positive performance is supported by strong data-center power demand and strategic buybacks, reinforcing the company's competitive position in the utility sector. The stock's price target has been adjusted downward by TD Cowen analyst Shelby Tucker to $230 from $253, indicating cautious optimism despite the earnings beat.
